failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the tool result showing deck material was "plastic" and produced the incorrect answer "No, it does not" instead of answering yes.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to determine whether item 2177997696 has deck material=plastic. The ProductCatalogSearch tool output at index 3 clearly returned one item with options.deck material equal to "plastic". At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, "No, it does not," contradicting the relevant tool output. This is not an invalid invocation, unsupported intent, underspecification, or system failure; the needed evidence was available and the agent reasoned incorrectly from it.
